tips_en: Start with the first paper because it introduces a large-scale style dataset and a state‑of‑the‑art style encoder that underpins many downstream visual tasks. Its methodology for generating consistent style pairs can also benefit embodied agents that rely on fine‑grained visual perception (as discussed in the third paper). The second paper’s live‑website evaluation framework offers a complementary perspective on benchmarking AI agents, which could later be applied to assess style‑aware agents.
tips_zh: 首先阅读第一篇论文，因为它提出了大规模风格数据集和最新的风格编码器，为许多下游视觉任务奠定基础。该文的风格配对生成方法也有助于提升依赖精细视觉感知的具身智能体（如第三篇论文所述）。第二篇论文的实时网页评估框架提供了另一种评估AI智能体的视角，后续可用于评估具备风格理解能力的智能体。
